## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and fwd.digital to discuss content strategy and execution plans.](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New workflow implemented: 294 potential content assignments identified, filtered for relevancy and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Aggressive content push planned: aim to publish high volume of quality content in next 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Focus on expertise and business outcomes from AI as key brand associations](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Shift to bi-weekly meetings with more async communication (Loom videos) in between](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overhaul

  - [New workflow using runtime layer plugged into cursor](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [Analyzed competitors (McKinsey, Accenture, IBM) for relevant content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [294 potential assignments identified, filtered from 4000+ initial keywords](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Segmented by difficulty, with sample assignments and key points to cover](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Goal: Find "branches" to expand content series (e.g., AI governance → data quality, fairness, transparency)](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Target Audience Considerations

  - [Need for more hand curation due to broad solution areas](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [Plan to leverage team of editors/writers and workflows to fine-tune content for specific audiences (e.g., IT department in healthcare)](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Focus on healthcare and life sciences as important verticals for AWS and NVIDIA partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

### Content Publication Strategy

  - [All content to be published on blog, but control what's featured/visible](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Use tags to differentiate between expert-led content and other categories](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Maintain balance between technical expertise and accessible business outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### Brand Voice and Positioning

  - [Aim to associate Tribe AI with expertise and technical talent](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Emphasize business outcomes from AI and Tribe as an enabler of value](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Highlight work with top companies, trillion-dollar tech firms, and leading private equity firms](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Focus on explaining technical concepts in digestible ways](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

### Content Production Plan

  - [Goal: Aggressive output in next 30 days, prioritizing lower difficulty, higher relevancy topics](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Custom GPT with DALL-E 3 for creating unique cover images](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Weekly process: 10 topics proposed on Monday, 5 selected, 5 articles delivered by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Refresh existing 52 articles to align with new standards](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Shift to bi-weekly 30-minute meetings instead of weekly](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Increase async communication via Loom videos](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Team to repass and refresh 52 existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Begin aggressive content production focusing on long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Jess to send 10 topics each Monday for Jaclyn to select 5](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with detailed plan based on discussion](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
  - [Monitor signals and performance, aiming for initial results in 2-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Develop brand voice guidelines as content production progresses](https://fathom.video/share/LiYyJRd-sQcPsZfswY4_ac3DX3ghtfer?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
